empty.title: No data
empty.message: No items to display at the moment.

filters.resetTooltip: Clear filters, search and visible sort (listing)

phoneMa.error: Invalid number — format +212 6/7 XX XX XX XX

documentWorkspace.exportNotImplemented: Export is not implemented for this document yet.

alerts.factureLate: {numero} {count, plural, =0 {0 days overdue} one {1 day overdue} other {# days overdue}}
alerts.cautionExpiry: {numero} {count, plural, =0 {expires in less than a day} one {expires in 1 day} other {expires in # days}}

bulkDelete.title: {count, plural, =0 {Delete} one {Delete 1 {entity}} other {Delete # {entity}}}
bulkDelete.message: {count, plural, =0 {No item selected.} one {Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.} other {Are you sure you want to delete these # items? This action cannot be undone.}}

toast.deleted: {count, plural, =0 {No item deleted.} one {1 item deleted.} other {# items deleted.}}
toast.exported: {count, plural, =0 {No item exported.} one {1 item exported.} other {# items exported.}}
toast.archived: {count, plural, =0 {No item archived.} one {1 item archived.} other {# items archived.}}
